title: Trichomoniasis Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
provider may be able to diagnose trichomoniasis when testing a sample of your urine (pee) for conditions with similar symptoms. For example, your provider can tell if you have trichomoniasis if they find trichomonas during general STI screening or when testing for a urinary tract infection . If they find trichomonas during this test, they may perform an NAAT or other tests to confirm the diagnosis.
